title: selaginella elegantissima
intro: Selaginella elegantissima, also known as Spikemoss or Fern Moss, is a species of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions like eczema. Selaginella elegantissima can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
